summary: Complete testing of Size Feature (المقاسات) for Trend Syria e-commerce app. All 4 features tested and working correctly: size display on product page, mandatory size selection before adding to cart, size display in cart page, and size sent with orders.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Product API returns available_sizes field correctly (S, M, L, XL, XXL)
✅ Backend: Product API returns size_type field correctly (clothes)
✅ Backend: Adding product without size returns 400 error with message 'يرجى اختيار المقاس'
✅ Backend: Adding product with invalid size returns 400 error with message 'المقاس غير متوفر'
✅ Backend: Adding product with valid size succeeds (200 response)
✅ Backend: Cart API returns selected_size for each cart item
✅ Backend: Same product with different sizes creates separate cart items
✅ Backend: Order creation includes selected_size in order items
✅ Frontend: Product detail page displays 'اختر المقاس (ملابس)' section
✅ Frontend: 5 size buttons displayed (S, M, L, XL, XXL) with data-testid attributes
✅ Frontend: Red warning text '* يرجى اختيار المقاس' shown when no size selected
✅ Frontend: Clicking add-to-cart without size shows error toast 'يرجى اختيار المقاس'
✅ Frontend: Selected size button highlighted in orange (#FF6B00)
✅ Frontend: Success toast includes size info 'تمت إضافة 1 تيشيرت رجالي قطن (L) إلى السلة'
✅ Frontend: Cart page displays 'المقاس: L' for items with selected size

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All size UI features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test product with sizes already exists: ID 334708a3-93ee-4d0a-9520-5bcfb22e864c (تيشيرت رجالي قطن with sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Size feature fully implemented and tested. Test product ID: 334708a3-93ee-4d0a-9520-5bcfb22e864c. Backend validates size selection for products with available_sizes. Frontend shows size selection UI with data-testid='size-{SIZE}' buttons. Cart displays selected_size. Payment API (ShamCash) is MOCKED - accepts any 6-digit OTP.

list: ShamCash Payment API - accepts any 6-digit OTP for testing
